node.statement: EXACT E6 (Closed-form V_J for Coulomb): V_J^{(S)} = 2 * C(4S-2J,2S-J)*C(4S+2J+2,2S+J+1) / C(4S+2,2S+1)^2 in units of 1/R = 1/(sqrt(S)*ell). For large S: V_J^{(S)} ~ (1/2)*S/sqrt(S^2-(J/2)^2). Fermions: only 2S-J odd (i.e., odd relative angular momentum) contribute. DERIVED: by explicit integration over sphere using spinor coordinates (P04-Fano Appendix eqs A7-A15). THIS IS THE KEY FORMULA FOR JULIA — pseudopotentials.jl computes this. [P04-Fano eq (25) = eq (A15)]
